---
title: ""
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: []
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .pg-404 {
            min-height: 80vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
            text-align: center;
          }
          .pg-404-num {
            font-size: clamp(5rem, 15vw, 10rem);
            font-weight: 900;
            line-height: 1;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #14B8A6 30%, #C5A46D 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
          }
          .pg-404-heading {
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
          }
          .pg-404-body {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 0 auto 2.5rem auto;
            line-height: 1.75;
          }
          .pg-404-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            justify-content: center;
          }
          </style>
---

::: {.pg-404}

::: {.pg-404-num}
404
:::

# The model returned null {.pg-404-heading}

::: {.pg-404-body}
We searched every dataset, queried every table, and checked every
probability — this page simply doesn't exist.

Maybe it was moved, maybe your prior was off, or maybe this is just a
very unlikely event in a very large sample space.
:::

::: {.pg-404-actions}
[← Back Home](/){.btn .btn-secondary}
[Browse Content](/content/en/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

:::
